hero.title: Subject Re-light
hero.description: Re-light subjects in existing images—people, characters, or products—without changing who or what they are. Experiment with dramatic, natural, or studio lighting to fit different moods and contexts.
hero.inputPlaceholder: Upload a subject image and describe the lighting you want (e.g., golden hour, studio key light)

steps.title: Upload an image with a clear subject
steps.description: Use portraits, character art, or product shots where the subject is easy to identify.

steps.title: Describe target lighting setup and mood
steps.description: Specify time of day, direction (side, back, top), hardness, and any color casts.

steps.title: Generate re-lit subject images
steps.description: AI adjusts lighting while preserving facial features, forms, and key details.

steps.title: Export variants for campaigns and experimentation
steps.description: Use different lighting versions for seasonal campaigns, A/B tests, or creative explorations.

items.question: Can I relight portraits without changing faces?
items.answer: Yes. AI adjusts lighting while preserving identity—facial features, form, and details remain intact.

items.question: Which lighting presets are available?
items.answer: Golden hour, studio key, backlight, top light, and custom directions with soft/hard intensity options.

items.question: Will skin tones and product colors stay accurate?
items.answer: Yes. The workflow maintains color fidelity while changing light direction and mood.

items.question: What inputs work best?
items.answer: Provide clear subjects—portraits, characters, or product shots—and describe target lighting (time of day, direction, hardness, color casts).

items.question: Can I generate multiple variants for A/B testing?
items.answer: Yes. Create lighting sets across moods and export variants for campaigns, banners, and creative exploration.

items.question: How do credits work per variant?
items.answer: Credits depend on resolution and number of variants. Start with 3–4 lighting looks, then expand based on results.
